response.overview: Filmed live at Dublin’s 3Olympia Theatre, Paul Smith: Pablo Live showcases Paul Smith’s full comedic range, from his unflinching audience interactions to outrageous tales of spending money irresponsibly, reflections on gender, and parenting mishaps. Packed with unfiltered humor and signature observational comedy, this special captures the essence of Paul Smith’s personality and leaves audiences laughing from start to finish. Fans of live comedy and sharp, relatable humor won’t want to miss a minute of this performance
response.title: Paul Smith: Pablo Live
